title: Xtra Spicy Malaysian Chicken Satay
description: A kid-friendly Malaysian dish featuring cumin seeds and a peppery flavor, this Xtra spicy chicken satay is a twist on the classic recipe, with a molten and spicy kick.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a blender, combine cumin seeds, coriander powder, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper to make a spice blend.
In a large bowl, whisk together the spice blend and coconut milk.
Add the chicken strips to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers.
Brush the grill with vegetable oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the chicken satay for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Serve the satay hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
Garnish with sliced onions and cilantro, if desired.
